title: Aunt Lori's Quinoa Radicchio Salad
ingredients: ½ head radicchio, cored and thinly sliced in small pieces
½ teaspoon flaked sea salt (e.g. Maldon)
¼ tsp. freshly ground black pepper
instructions: Place 2 cups of water in a small saucepan with a pinch of salt and heat to boiling.
Rinse quinoa in a fine-mesh strainer under cold water and drain.
Add quinoa to boiling water, stir, and reduce heat to low.
Cover saucepan and cook over low heat for about 15-18 minutes or until water is absorbed.
Remove quinoa from heat, fluff with a fork, and let cool slightly.
Transfer to a large bowl, fluff again with a fork and let cool for approximately 20 minutes.
Add balsamic vinegar, olive oil, radicchio, dried tart cherries, pistachios, parsley, sea salt, and black pepper.
notes: This recipe was given by my sister in 2019.
I frequently crave this salad and yummy combinations of flavor.
I made some minor adaptations to the original recipe.
Leftover salad keeps well for a day or two.
